identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a developer-focused, high-performance PKML platform with zero 'AI slop'.

headings.usage: All headings (h1-h6), code blocks, prominent data values.

body.usage: UI labels, documentation text, long-form content.

rules.hierarchy: Contrast through weight (Regular vs Bold) rather than just size.

colors.contrast_rules: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Use text-zinc-400 for muted text, never lower.
colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Default. No light mode toggle needed unless requested (user asked for Developer Focus).

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
spacing.editor_layout: Full height (h-[calc(100vh-4rem)]). Split view with resizable handles.

grids.dashboard: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Charts span 2 cols.
grids.gallery: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8. Aspect-video cards.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px border (border-zinc-800). No shadow by default. Hover: border-zinc-600.

borders.active_state: Tracing Beam effect on active editor pane.

backgrounds.app_bg: Solid #09090b with subtle 'Grid Borders' pattern in empty states.
backgrounds.hero_bg: Radial gradient overlay or subtle 'Star field' using tsparticles.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white rounded-md px-3 py-2

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm font-mono placeholder:text-zinc-600

feedback.toast: Use 'sonner'. Dark background, white text, colored icons for status.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @monaco-editor/react immediately for the code editor.
Install react-resizable-panels for the split-screen layout.
Configure Tailwind for Dark Mode default (class strategy, but force dark class on html/body).
Use JetBrains Mono for all code-related UI elements (editor, logs, JSON previews).
Implement a 'Validation Status' bar at the bottom of the editor.
Create a 'Visual Builder' using a form-based approach (Shadcn Form) that updates the JSON in real-time.
Use LocalStorage to save the current draft automatically.
Ensure the 'Generate Example PKML' button creates a valid, complex JSON structure.
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. Missing categories = placeholder text (FORBIDDEN).
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
